strings.Image.Title: Image conversion
strings.Image.Intro: Select an image, inspect local metadata, choose a 3D image workflow, and prepare image conversion. Stereoscopic conversion requires verified bundled iw3 image support.
strings.Image.Home.CardBody: Next: verified bundled iw3 image-depth export, then parallax/2.5D workflow.
strings.Image.Workflow.Title: Choose an image workflow
strings.Image.Workflow.Parallax.Title: 2.5D Photo
strings.Image.Workflow.Parallax.Description: Uses bundled iw3 to generate a real depth map, then creates a short depth-based 2.5D parallax MP4 with local FFmpeg.
strings.Image.Workflow.Stereo.Title: Stereoscopic image
strings.Image.Workflow.Stereo.Description: Uses verified bundled iw3/depth support to create the selected stereoscopic still output when the bundle provides that image capability.
strings.Image.Step.Source.Title: Source & analysis
strings.Image.Step.Setup.Title: Setup
strings.Image.Step.Export.Title: Preview & export
strings.Image.Step.SourceMode.Title: Source & mode
strings.Image.Source.Title: Source image
strings.Image.Source.Body: Select one local image. Metadata is analyzed locally as soon as the image is selected.
strings.Image.Source.Drop: Drop one image file here or browse for a file.
strings.Image.Source.SupportedFormats: Supported inputs: JPG, JPEG, PNG, BMP, TIF, TIFF, WEBP
strings.Image.Source.Status.SelectSupported: Select a supported image to unlock setup.
strings.Image.Metadata.Title: Image metadata
strings.Image.Summary.Title: Image summary
strings.Image.Summary.SupportedInputs: Supported inputs: JPG, JPEG, PNG, BMP, TIF, TIFF, WEBP
strings.Image.Setup.NoWorkflowHint: Choose a workflow to configure image setup.
strings.Image.Setup.OutputPlan.Parallax: Output: depth-based 2.5D parallax MP4 in the same folder as the source image.
strings.Image.Setup.OutputPlan.Stereo: Output: stereoscopic still image in the same folder as the source image.
strings.Image.Setup.OutputPlan.Choose: Choose an image workflow to prepare an output plan.
strings.Image.Setup.Summary.NoWorkflow: Select a workflow mode before configuring image setup.
strings.Image.Setup.LocalModelReadinessNote: Image export uses only bundled iw3 runtime files and bundled mapped depth models.
strings.Image.Parallax.Preview.Title: Parallax preview
strings.Image.Parallax.DepthPanel.Title: Depth map generated by bundled iw3

strings.Image.Parallax.QuickSummary.Title: Quick summary
strings.Image.Parallax.Result.Title: 2.5D result/export
strings.Image.Parallax.Result.Summary: Output target: depth-based 2.5D parallax MP4, loop-friendly motion, generated with bundled iw3 depth and FFmpeg.
strings.Image.Parallax.QualityGuidance: Use Low or Medium depth and Subtle motion for fewer artifacts. High intensity can distort edges, thin objects, transparent areas, smoke, shiny effects, and overlapping subjects.
strings.Image.Parallax.ModelGuidance.None: No bundled image-capable depth model is selected yet.
strings.Image.Parallax.ModelGuidance.Format: Using bundled image-capable depth model: {model}. For complex scenes, prefer conservative depth and subtle motion.

strings.Image.Parallax.MotionDirection.Label: Motion direction

strings.Image.Parallax.Duration.Label: Duration
strings.Image.Parallax.Smoothing.Label: Smoothing
strings.Image.Parallax.LayerBehavior.Label: Layer/depth behavior
strings.Image.Stereo.Preview.Title: Source preview
strings.Image.Stereo.Controls.Title: Stereo controls
strings.Image.Stereo.Summary.Format: Selected output: {outputFormat}. Conversion uses bundled iw3 depth processing when readiness is complete.
strings.Image.Stereo.Result.Title: Stereoscopic results

strings.Image.Stereo.BundledIw3Note: Conversion uses bundled iw3/depth, a local mapped model, and app-local tools only; no system Python, PATH tools, pip, or downloads.
strings.Image.Model.Selector.Label: Image depth model
strings.Image.Model.Selection.SharedNote: Uses the same bundled model inventory as Video conversion.
strings.Image.Model.Selected.None: Model: no mapped bundled depth model selected.
strings.Image.ModelHelp.Title: Image model help
strings.Image.ModelHelp.Description: Only installed local models mapped to an image-capable iw3 depth mode are shown for image conversion workflows. Video-only or unmapped files are not selectable for image conversion.
strings.Image.ModelHelp.Tooltip: Explain local models compatible with image conversion workflows.
strings.Image.ModelHelp.PurposeSuffix: Compatible with image depth for 2.5D Parallax.
strings.Image.ModelHelp.UseSuffix: Use low/medium depth for thin objects, transparency, or overlapping subjects.

strings.Image.Output.ExpectedPath.Missing: Output path: same folder as the selected source image.

strings.Image.Readiness.Iw3CapabilitiesMissing.F: Bundled iw3 image export is blocked because IW3_CLI_CAPABILITIES.json does not verify {options}.

strings.Image.Progress.NotStarted: No image conversion has run yet.
strings.Image.Progress.PreparingStereo: Preparing bundled iw3 stereoscopic image conversion.

strings.Image.Log.Empty: Tracks image analysis, setup, bundled iw3 export readiness, and export results.
strings.Image.Log.WorkflowReady: Image workflow ready. Select an image to begin.
strings.Image.Log.UnsupportedFormat: The selected file is not a supported image format.

strings.Image.Log.StereoStarted: Bundled iw3 image stereo export started.
strings.Image.Log.HighResolutionParallaxWarning: High-resolution 2.5D conversion can take a while; progress is reported by depth export, frame generation, and FFmpeg encoding phase.

strings.Image.Log.OpenOutputFolderFailed.Format: Could not open image output folder: {message}

strings.Image.Log.SetupChanged.OutdatedPrepare.F: {change} Previous image conversion output is outdated. Prepare conversion again.

strings.Video.Title: Video conversion
strings.Video.Intro: Select a video, analyze it locally, choose a 3D setup, generate a preview, and convert with bundled local tools.
strings.Video.Subtitle: Local offline 2D to 3D video conversion
strings.Video.Home.CardBody: Ready now: analyze a video, choose the LG 3D preset, generate a preview, then convert locally.
strings.Video.Home.StatusSummary: Video conversion is ready. Image conversion is gated on verified bundled iw3 image capability.
strings.Video.Step.Source.Title: Source & analysis
strings.Video.Step.Setup.Title: 3D setup
strings.Video.Step.Plan.Title: Conversion plan
strings.Video.Source.Title: Source video

Source resolution is higher than the selected preset target. The recommended output should be downscaled to {width}x{height}.

strings.Video.Recommendation.Compatibility.Mkv.G: MKV is a good master/archive source, but MP4 is recommended for broad playback compatibility.

strings.Video.Dialog.Replace.Body: Selecting a new video will clear the current analysis, recommended setup, conversion plan, and custom output path before analyzing the new video. Plan options may update when the new recommendation is prepared.

strings.Video.Dialog.PreviewInvalidation.Body: You already generated a preview for the current setup. Changing this setting will invalidate that preview and you will need to generate it again before final conversion.

strings.Video.Error.Analysis.MissingFfprobe: FFprobe is missing. Refresh System status and verify the bundled tools.
strings.Video.Error.Analysis.EmptyOutput: FFprobe did not return analysis data.
strings.Video.Error.Analysis.InvalidJson: FFprobe returned analysis data that could not be read.
strings.Video.Profile.Description.Recommended: Default general-purpose profile for most 3D TVs and media players.
strings.Video.Profile.Description.MaximumCompati: Conservative MP4/H.264 output for older TVs and media players.
strings.Video.Profile.Description.LegacyLg2012: Legacy compatibility profile for older LG Full HD 3D TVs.
strings.Video.Profile.BestFor.Recommended: Best first choice for modern 3D TV playback and general testing.
strings.Video.Profile.BestFor.MaximumCompatibili: Best when playback compatibility matters more than file size or maximum quality.
strings.Video.Profile.BestFor.HighQualityMaster: Best when preserving quality matters more than file size.
strings.Video.Profile.BestFor.LegacyLg2012: Best for LG passive 3D TVs that support Side-by-Side playback.
strings.Video.Profile.Compatibility.Recommended: Uses broad MP4/H.264 1080p defaults. Older devices may need the Maximum Compatibility or Legacy LG profile.
strings.Video.Profile.Compatibility.MaximumCompa: Keeps the same safe 1080p target with a more conservative bitrate expectation.
strings.Video.Profile.Compatibility.HighQualityM: MKV is useful for master files, but MP4 is still the safer direct-playback choice for many TVs.
strings.Video.Profile.Compatibility.LegacyLg2012: LG 3D TV 2012 compatibility preparation creates an optional Full HD MP4 copy from the completed primary output. It uses Side-by-Side playback guidance and does not claim perfect TV compatibility.
strings.Video.Profile.PlaybackTitle.LegacyLg2012: How to watch on the TV
strings.Video.Profile.PlaybackInstructions.Recom: Use Top & Bottom / Half Top-Bottom mode on the TV or player when available.
strings.Video.Profile.PlaybackInstructions.Maxim: Use this profile for older TVs, USB playback, or media players that are picky about files.
strings.Video.Profile.PlaybackInstructions.HighQ: Use this when you want a larger master/archive file before creating smaller playback copies.
strings.Video.Profile.PlaybackInstructions.Legac:
1. Copy the converted video to a USB drive or play it from your media player/server.
2. Open the video on the LG 3D TV.
3. Enable the TV 3D mode.
4. Select Side-by-Side mode.
5. Use your passive 3D glasses.
strings.Video.Profile.Details.Title: Profile details
strings.Video.Profile.Description.Label: Description
strings.Video.Profile.BestFor.Label: Best for
strings.Video.Profile.AdvancedOutput: MKV: advanced/master primary output. LG compatibility: optional MP4 copy after the primary output succeeds.
strings.Home.Title: Welcome to v3dfy
strings.Home.Description: Local/offline tools for creating 3D media from existing 2D video and image sources.
strings.Home.Settings.CardBody: Check local tools, models, diagnostics, language, theme, and licenses.
strings.Settings.Models.Intro: Review detected local models or import a reviewed model pack.
strings.Settings.ToolsEngine.Intro: Local tool and engine status for the published runtime layout.
strings.Settings.LogsDiagnostics.Intro: Technical details for local tools, model inventory, and conversion readiness.
strings.Settings.About.LicensesText.Format:
v3dfy version: {version}
Licenses and notices are bundled under licenses/ when release payloads are prepared. Review docs/legal-notes.md before distributing an installer.
strings.Settings.About.ModelNotices.Title: Model notices
strings.ActivityLog.Name: activity log
strings.Diagnostics.PerformanceHistory.LoadWarni: Performance history could not be loaded and was ignored: {warning}
strings.Diagnostics.PerformanceHistory.SaveWarni: Performance history could not be saved: {warning}
strings.ModelPack.Instruction: Valid model packs are reviewed before Windows asks for administrator permission.
strings.ModelPack.Status.NotRun: No model pack import has run yet.
strings.ModelPack.Status.UnavailableBusy: Model pack import is unavailable while another operation is running.
strings.ModelPack.Status.Validated: Model pack validated. Review the confirmation before Windows asks for administrator permission.
strings.ModelPack.Status.CanceledBeforeAdmin: Model pack import canceled before Windows administrator permission.
strings.ModelPack.Status.ImportDidNotStart: Model pack import did not start. Windows administrator permission may have been canceled.
strings.ModelPack.Summary.UnexpectedFailure.Form: Model pack import failed unexpectedly. Details were written to {path}. {message}
strings.ModelPack.Summary.CanceledNoFiles: Model pack import canceled. No files were installed.
strings.ModelPack.Summary.PreparationMissingRequ: Model pack import preparation did not produce a launchable helper request.
strings.ModelPack.Summary.HelperFailed: Model pack helper did not report a successful install.
strings.ModelPack.Summary.ImportDidNotStartNoFil: Model pack import did not start. No files were installed.
strings.ModelPack.Summary.SelectableModels: Selectable models: only supported/mapped models are shown for conversion.
strings.ModelPack.Log.UnavailableBusy: Model pack import is unavailable while another operation is running.
strings.ModelPack.Log.Validated.Format: Model pack validated: {name}. Files to install: {filesToInstall}. Already installed: {alreadyInstalled}.
strings.ModelPack.Log.AdminRequired: Windows administrator permission is required because the model target is under Program Files.
strings.ModelPack.Log.AdminMaybeNotRequired: The model target is outside Program Files; administrator permission may not be required for this target.
strings.ModelPack.Log.CanceledBeforeHelper.Forma: Model pack import canceled before launching the helper: {file}
strings.ModelPack.Log.ValidationFailed: Model pack validation failed. Helper was not launched.
strings.ModelPack.Log.ImportDidNotStart: Model pack import did not start. Windows administrator permission may have been canceled.
strings.ModelPack.Log.InventoryRefreshed: Model inventory refreshed after model pack import.
strings.ModelPack.Confirmation.Title: Confirm model pack import
strings.ModelPack.Confirmation.Intro: Review this model pack before Windows asks for administrator permission.
strings.ModelPack.Confirmation.AdminRequired: Administrator/UAC permission: required. Windows will ask for permission before installing.
strings.ModelPack.Confirmation.AdminNotExpected: Administrator/UAC permission: not expected for this target, but Windows may still ask depending on folder permissions.
strings.ModelPack.Confirmation.ModelAvailability: Model availability: imported models become selectable only when v3dfy already supports or maps them.
strings.ModelPack.Confirmation.TrustInstruction: Continue only if you trust this model pack.
strings.ModelInventory.Title: 3D models
strings.ModelInventory.Intro: Review local models detected by v3dfy. Only mapped and verified models are selectable for conversion.
strings.ModelInventory.Selectable.Empty: No selectable models are available yet.
strings.ModelInventory.Selectable.Unavailable: No selectable models are available. A verified v3dfy mapping is required before a detected file can be used for conversion.
strings.ModelInventory.Selectable.Status.UserPro: Selectable when this user-provided checkpoint exists, but not eligible for public v3dfy model packs because weight redistribution is not cleared.
strings.ModelInventory.Selectable.Status.Verifie: Ready when the verified local checkpoint exists in the bundled iw3 pretrained_models folder.
strings.ModelInventory.Diagnostic.Empty: No diagnostic-only model files were detected.
strings.ModelInventory.Diagnostic.Reason: Reason: no verified v3dfy mapping / diagnostic only.
strings.ModelInventory.RuntimeDependencies.Title: Runtime dependencies
strings.ModelInventory.RuntimeDependency.Note: Note: runtime dependency, not a selectable model.
strings.ModelInventory.Actions.Title: Actions
strings.ModelInventory.Notice.NoModels: No installed or imported models were detected.
strings.ModelInventory.Guidance.BestFor.Recommen: movies, anime, mixed scenes, and quick tests
strings.ModelInventory.Guidance.BestFor.Experime: testing detailed scenes when speed matters less
strings.ModelInventory.Guidance.BestFor.IndoorRo: rooms, dialogue scenes, offices, and indoor animation
strings.ModelInventory.Guidance.BestFor.OutdoorR: roads, landscapes, city streets, sea, and boats
strings.ModelInventory.Guidance.BestFor.Included: starting conversions without any optional model pack
strings.ModelInventory.Guidance.BestFor.Balanced: general movies and mixed indoor/outdoor scenes
strings.ModelInventory.Guidance.BestFor.SmallGen: general scenes, quick tests, and older machines
strings.ModelInventory.Help.Purpose.MetricHypers: Lightweight metric model tuned for indoor-like scenes.
Base metric model tuned for indoor-like scenes.
strings.ModelInventory.Help.Purpose.MetricVkitti: Lightweight metric model tuned for outdoor-like scenes.
Base metric model tuned for outdoor-like scenes.
strings.ModelInventory.Help.Purpose.DepthAnythin: Depth Anything 3 variant tuned for 3D TV output.
strings.ModelInventory.Help.Use.MetricIndoor: Rooms, people indoors, movie interiors. Examples: dramas, animation interiors, dialogue scenes, bedrooms, offices.
strings.ModelInventory.Help.Use.MetricOutdoor: Road, landscape, and outdoor scenes. Examples: streets, mountains, beaches, sea, boats, wide exterior shots.
strings.ModelInventory.Help.Use.V2Small: Good first optional model for faster conversions. Examples: general movies, anime, mixed scenes, quick tests.
strings.ModelInventory.Help.Use.Small: Lightweight conversions when size matters. Examples: quick tests, low storage, older machines.
strings.ModelInventory.Help.Use.Base: Balanced quality and size for Depth Anything v1. Examples: general movies, animation, mixed indoor/outdoor scenes.
strings.ModelInventory.Help.Use.Large: Quality-focused conversions when speed matters less. Examples: detailed movies, close-ups, complex scenes.
strings.ModelInventory.Help.Use.MetricHypersimSm: Indoor or indoor-like metric scenes. Examples: rooms, corridors, offices, CG interiors.
strings.ModelInventory.Help.Use.MetricHypersimBa: Indoor metric base model. Examples: detailed interiors, rooms, hallways, CG/animated interiors.
strings.ModelInventory.Help.Use.MetricVkittiSmal: Outdoor metric scenes. Examples: roads, cars, city streets, landscapes, sea, boats.
strings.ModelInventory.Help.Use.MetricVkittiBase: Outdoor metric base model. Examples: road scenes, landscapes, outdoor action, sea/boats.
strings.ModelInventory.Help.Use.DistillAnyDepthS: Small distilled depth model. Examples: quick comparisons, experimental tests, general scenes.
strings.ModelInventory.Help.Use.DepthAnything3Mo: General scenes when trying Depth Anything 3. Examples: movies, animation, detailed mixed scenes.
3D TV/anaglyph-oriented Depth Anything 3 variant. Examples: TV playback tests, anaglyph tests, 3D TV experiments.
strings.ModelInventory.Help.Use.UserProvided: Only when you supplied this checkpoint yourself; it is not an official v3dfy pack.
strings.ModelInventory.Help.Use.Default: Local conversions when this model is installed.
strings.System.Status.Title: System status
strings.System.Tool.Reason.EngineBundleFound: Required manifest and iw3 entry found
strings.System.Tool.Reason.EnginePlaceholderOnly: Only placeholder or contract files found
strings.System.Tool.Detail.EngineBundleFound.For: Local iw3 bundle found under: {path}. Required: non-placeholder ENGINE_MANIFEST.json and nunif/iw3/__main__.py.
strings.System.Tool.Detail.EngineFolderMissing.F: Expected local iw3 engine folder: {path}. Required layout: ENGINE_MANIFEST.json, python/python.exe, nunif/iw3/__main__.py, and nunif/iw3/pretrained_models.
strings.System.Tool.Detail.EnginePlaceholderOnly: Engine folder exists, but only placeholder or contract files were detected: {path}. Add a real nunif bundle with a non-placeholder ENGINE_MANIFEST.json and nunif/iw3/__main__.py.
strings.System.Tool.Detail.EngineManifestMissing: Engine content exists, but ENGINE_MANIFEST.json is missing or still has version=placeholder: {path}
strings.System.Tool.Detail.EngineEntryMissing.Fo: Engine manifest exists, but no supported iw3 entry file was found. Expected nunif/iw3/__main__.py under: {path}
strings.System.Tool.Detail.ModelsFolderMissing.F: Expected local iw3 pretrained models folder: {path}
strings.System.Tool.Detail.ModelFilesMissing.For: No supported model files found in: {path}
strings.System.Tool.Detail.Iw3RuntimeDependencyM: Missing iw3 runtime dependency: {path}. The bundle is not fully offline-ready and iw3 may try to download this file at runtime.
strings.System.Log.OpenEngineFolderFailed.Format: Could not open expected engine folder: {message}
strings.System.Log.OpenModelsFolderFailed.Format: Could not open expected models folder: {message}
strings.TechnicalDetails.CatalogMissingEntries.F: Entries referencing missing or unsupported files: {count}
strings.TechnicalDetails.NoCompatibleModelFiles: No compatible model files were found.
strings.TechnicalDetails.NoMappedSelectableModel: - None. A verified iw3 depth-model mapping is required before conversion.
strings.TechnicalDetails.UnmappedModelFilesFound: Unmapped model files were found. Add a model catalog entry or mapping before using them.
strings.TechnicalDetails.Catalog.Missing: Model catalog not found. Compatible files are treated as unmanaged local models.
strings.TechnicalDetails.Catalog.Placeholder: Model catalog is a placeholder and is ignored.
strings.TechnicalDetails.Catalog.UnmanagedFallba: Compatible files are treated as unmanaged local models.
strings.TechnicalDetails.Catalog.ExistingFiles: Catalog entries with existing compatible files:
strings.TechnicalDetails.Catalog.MissingFiles: Catalog entries with missing or unsupported files:
strings.TechnicalDetails.Iw3Capabilities.Title: iw3 CLI capabilities
strings.TechnicalDetails.Iw3Capabilities.Missing: IW3_CLI_CAPABILITIES.json was not found. v3dfy will use the confirmed base iw3 command only.
strings.TechnicalDetails.Iw3Capabilities.Invalid: Capabilities metadata could not be read: {message}
strings.TechnicalDetails.Iw3Capabilities.Placeho: Capabilities metadata is placeholder and is not treated as verified.
strings.TechnicalDetails.Iw3Capabilities.Diagnos: Capabilities metadata is diagnostic only; unverified options are not added to the command.
strings.Video.Preview.Gate.Accepted.Detail: The accepted preview matches the current selected configuration.
strings.Video.Preview.Gate.Outdated.Detail: Regenerate and accept the preview before final conversion.
strings.Video.Preview.Gate.Required.AfterAnalysi: Generate and accept a preview after the video analysis is complete.
strings.Video.Preview.Gate.Required.Generating: Wait for the preview to finish, then review and continue.
strings.Video.Preview.Gate.Required.Ready: Review the preview and click Continue before final conversion.
strings.Video.Preview.Gate.Required.Failed: Generate a successful preview before final conversion.
strings.Video.Preview.Gate.Required.Canceled: Generate and accept a preview before final conversion.
strings.Video.Preview.Gate.Required.Default: Generate and accept a preview before final conversion.
strings.Video.Preview.State.AcceptedUnlocked: Preview accepted. Final conversion is unlocked.
strings.Video.Preview.State.OutdatedForCurrentSe: Preview is outdated. Regenerate it for the current settings.
strings.Video.Output.OpenPreview.SkippedNoReady: Open preview skipped because no current preview is ready.
strings.Video.Output.OpenPreview.FileMissing: Open preview skipped because the preview file was not found.
strings.Video.Output.OpenFinal.FileMissing: Open video skipped because the final output file was not found.
strings.Video.Output.OpenFinal.Failed.Format: Conversion completed, but opening the video failed: {message}
strings.Video.Readiness.Status.Ready: Conversion ready. All required local components are available.
strings.Video.Readiness.Status.Blocked: Conversion unavailable. Required local components are missing.
strings.Video.Readiness.Status.UnmappedModel: Conversion unavailable. Selected local model is not mapped to a verified iw3 depth model yet.
strings.Video.Readiness.RequiredComponents: Required components: FFmpeg, FFprobe, embedded Python runtime, local iw3 engine, local 3D models, iw3 runtime dependencies.
strings.Video.Readiness.Issue.SelectedModelUnmap: Selected local model is not mapped to a verified iw3 depth model yet.
strings.Video.Conversion.Gate.NoCompletedAnalysi: Conversion blocked until a source video is analyzed.
Analyze a video before conversion can start. No local process was started.
strings.Video.Conversion.Gate.MissingPlan.Status: Conversion blocked until a conversion plan is prepared.
strings.Video.Conversion.Gate.MissingPlan.Detail: Prepare the conversion plan before conversion can start. No local process was started.
strings.Video.Conversion.Gate.ReadinessUnknown.S: Conversion blocked until local dependency readiness is checked.
strings.Video.Conversion.Gate.ReadinessUnknown.D: Refresh system status before conversion can start. No local process was started.
strings.Video.Conversion.Gate.MissingDependencie: Conversion blocked by missing local engine dependencies.
Bundle FFmpeg, FFprobe, embedded Python, the local iw3 engine, and local 3D models before conversion. No Python, iw3, or FFmpeg conversion process was started.
strings.Video.Conversion.Gate.FeatureDisabled.St: Conversion execution is not enabled yet.
strings.Video.Conversion.Gate.FeatureDisabled.De: Conversion execution was explicitly disabled by configuration. No Python, iw3, or FFmpeg conversion process was started.
strings.Video.Conversion.OpenPlanBeforePreview: Review the conversion plan before generating a preview.
strings.Video.Conversion.ControlsReady: Preview and conversion controls are ready.
strings.Video.Conversion.OpenPlanBeforeFinal: Open the conversion plan and continue before starting final conversion.
strings.Video.Conversion.Detail.LaunchingBundled: Launching bundled Python with local iw3. Writing to a partial output first.
strings.Video.Conversion.Detail.LgCopyPostProces: Post-processing the completed primary output with bundled FFmpeg.
strings.Video.Conversion.Detail.CancelRequested: A cancellation request was sent to the local process.
strings.Video.Conversion.Summary.InvalidRequest: Local iw3 conversion request is invalid. No local process was started.
strings.Video.Conversion.Summary.DryRunBlocked: Local iw3 conversion is blocked because the request is a dry-run preview.
strings.Video.Conversion.Summary.UnmappedModel: Selected local model is not mapped to a verified iw3 depth model yet.
strings.Video.Conversion.Summary.PartialPreparat: Local iw3 conversion could not prepare the partial output file.
strings.ProcessMetrics.Status.NoProcessGpuEngine: No GPU Engine counter was found for this process
strings.ProcessMetrics.Status.WindowsMetricsUnav: Metrics unavailable on this Windows version/driver
strings.Image.Export.Summary.StereoCompleted: Bundled iw3 image stereo export completed.
strings.Image.Export.Summary.StereoFailed: Bundled iw3 image stereo export failed.
strings.Image.Export.Summary.StereoBlocked: Bundled iw3 image stereo export is not ready.
strings.Image.Export.Summary.ParallaxBlocked: Bundled iw3 2.5D image conversion is not ready.
strings.Image.Export.Progress.StereoStarting: Starting bundled iw3 image stereo export.
strings.Image.Export.Progress.StereoCompleted: Bundled iw3 image stereo export completed.
strings.Image.Export.Progress.StereoFailed.Forma: Bundled iw3 image stereo export failed with exit code {exitCode}.
strings.Image.Export.Progress.ParallaxDepthStart: Starting bundled iw3 depth export. This can take a while for high-resolution images.
strings.Image.Export.Progress.ExpectedDepthMapMi: Expected depth map was not created: {path}
strings.Image.Export.Progress.ParallaxFramesGene: Generating {frameCount} 2.5D parallax frames from the depth map.
strings.Image.Export.Progress.NoParallaxFrames.F: No parallax frames were created under: {path}
strings.Image.Export.Progress.ParallaxFramesComp: Parallax frame generation completed: {frameCount} frame(s) in {elapsed}.
strings.Image.Export.Progress.ExpectedMp4Missing: Expected MP4 output was not created: {path}
